candidates.name: Poravela
candidates.logic: pore + vela/veil; porous surface with light air
candidates.screening: No strong software/UI collision surfaced in broad web search snapshot; official DB search still required.

candidates.name: Aervel
candidates.screening: Search snapshot showed noisy historical OCR results, not clear software conflict; official DB search required.

candidates.name: Luvaira
candidates.screening: Search snapshot showed literary/geographic references rather than software; official DB search required.

candidates.name: AerVeil
candidates.logic: air veil; very descriptive of the surface layer
candidates.screening: Conceptually strong but descriptive; may be weaker as registrable master mark.

candidates.name: Perfora Air
candidates.screening: Conceptually strongest but prior Perfora use makes it better as internal system name for now.

candidates.name: Poralux
candidates.screening: Prior Poralux lighting/industrial references exist; not ideal as final mark without formal clearance.

candidates.name: Veyra
candidates.screening: Search found software/services trademark signals; avoid.

candidates.name: Aivora
candidates.screening: Search found AIVORA TEC software services filing signal; avoid for this project.

candidates.name: Aevora
candidates.screening: Search found existing Aevora entities/trademark-like uses; avoid.

candidates.name: Aerium
